queries.question: For each tech startup, list information about the jobs they have.
queries.sql: select tech_startups.name , tech_jobs.job_title , tech_jobs.description from Tech_Startups_Tech_Jobs join Tech_Jobs on Tech_Startups_Tech_Jobs.tech_job_id = Tech_Jobs.id join Tech_Startups on Tech_Startups_Tech_Jobs.tech_startup_id = Tech_Startups.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?job_title ?description WHERE {
  ?tech_startups_tech_jobs a :Tech_Startups_Tech_Jobs .
  ?tech_jobs a :TechJob .
  ?tech_startups_tech_jobs p:hasTech_Jobs ?tech_jobs .
  ?tech_startups a :Tech_Startups .
  ?tech_startups_tech_jobs p:hasTech_Startups ?tech_startups .
  ?tech_startups p:name ?name .
  ?tech_jobs p:job_title ?job_title .
  ?tech_jobs p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: Give me the titles and descriptions of the jobs that every tech startup has.
queries.sql: SELECT Tech_Jobs.job_title, Tech_Jobs.description  from Tech_Startups_Tech_Jobs join Tech_Jobs on Tech_Startups_Tech_Jobs.tech_job_id = Tech_Jobs.id join Tech_Startups on Tech_Startups_Tech_Jobs.tech_startup_id = Tech_Startups.id   GROUP BY Tech_Startups_Tech_Jobs.tech_job_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Tech_Startups_Tech_Jobs.tech_startup_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Tech_Startups)

queries.question: What is the tech job description of each tech startup?
queries.sql: SELECT Tech_Jobs.description  from Tech_Startups_Tech_Jobs join Tech_Jobs on Tech_Startups_Tech_Jobs.tech_job_id = Tech_Jobs.id join Tech_Startups on Tech_Startups_Tech_Jobs.tech_startup_id = Tech_Startups.id   GROUP BY Tech_Startups_Tech_Jobs.tech_job_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Tech_Startups_Tech_Jobs.tech_startup_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Tech_Startups)

Show me the jobs each startup has.
